# Invoice Template

> Replace placeholders before issuing.

## Invoice Header

- **Business name:** [Your company legal name]
- **Address:** [Business address]
- **Phone:** [Phone]
- **Email:** [Email]
- **GST/HST number:** [If registered]

## Invoice Details

- **Invoice number:** [INV-0001]
- **Invoice date:** [YYYY-MM-DD]
- **Due date:** [YYYY-MM-DD]
- **Client name:** [Client]
- **Service address:** [Address]

## Line Items

| Description | Qty | Unit price | Subtotal |
| --- | ---: | ---: | ---: |
| [Example: Standard cleaning - 3 bedroom home] | 1 | $[ ] | $[ ] |
| [Optional supplies/equipment surcharge] | 1 | $[ ] | $[ ] |

## Totals

- **Subtotal:** $[ ]
- **HST (15%)**: $[ ] (if applicable)
- **Total due:** $[ ]

## Payment Terms

- Payment method(s): [e-transfer, card, bank transfer, etc.]
- Payment due: [Net 7 / Net 15 / due on receipt]
- Late payment fee policy: [Insert policy]

## Notes

- Thank you for your business.
- For questions about this invoice, contact [email / phone].
